plugins.name: andrewrabert-dev
plugins.description: Development conventions for Python, shell scripting, terminal UIs, and code comments, plus a design-architect agent that reviews and advises on code-organization quality: separation of concerns, leaky abstractions, RAII/lifecycle, interface design, change resilience, dependency strategy, delivery sequencing

plugins.name: handoff-verifier
plugins.description: Self-verification hooks managed by MCP tools: a Stop reminder that forces one more reasoning turn before a turn ends, plus ExitPlanMode and AskUserQuestion gates that block the tool until you self-certify the constraints are met via a token confirm. Each check is set per global, project, or session scope, and the hook concatenates the active scopes broad-to-narrow

plugins.name: terse
plugins.description: Mirror of the global Stop-hook verifier: answer only what was asked, lead with the direct answer, drop all filler
